productDisplayName: Puma Women Grey Axis Sports Shoes
description: The Axis range from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. A great neutral running shoe, it looks fabulous when teamed with casual wear as well. UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for structure and breathabilityFormstripe and cat logo on the sides for added style and structureCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortLace-ups for snug FitMidsolePhylon midsole for strength and lightweight structureOrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleArchTec for greater ease in heel to toe transitionFlex grooves built across the outsole to enhance flexibilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore away from sunlight
